name: Bake-And-Take Peach Coffeecake
recipeInstructions:
Topping:
1 1/2 cups flour
1/2 cup butter or margarine
1 cup sugar
1. Mix together the flour, sugar, eggs, baking powder, butter (or margarine), and milk (or cream) with your hands to make a smooth dough. If the dough does not stick together, add 1-3 tablespoons more milk.
2. Place three quarters of the dough mixture into a greased 12x18 inch edged cookie sheet or jelly roll pan. Roll out the dough with a rolling pin or press it with your hands to cover the entire pan, including edges.
3. Cover the dough with sliced peaches and sprinkle with a little sugar.
4. To make the topping, combine the flour, butter (or margarine), and sugar into a crumb mixture. Sprinkle over the dough.
5. Roll the remaining dough into strips and cover the peaches with a lattice top. You can also place crumbs on the peaches and strips over the peaches before adding a little almond flavoring to the peaches, if desired.
6. Bake at 350°F for 40-50 minutes.
